primitive_verdicts.verdict: Approximate success on short calibrated pulses
primitive_verdicts.main_obstruction: Branch detuning from chi and finite-pulse phase accumulation; naive echo fails once the inserted pi pulse becomes manifold dependent.
Photon-number-dependent qubit detuning through chi and chi-prime turns the pulse into a Fock-selective operation as cavity occupation grows.

primitive_verdicts.ideal_claim: Blockwise qubit rotation up to removable conditional phases
primitive_verdicts.main_obstruction: Strict logical gauge is not preserved; a later SNAP or virtual-Z cleanup layer is still needed.

primitive_verdicts.ideal_claim: $\sum_n |n\rangle\langle n| \otimes R_x(\theta_n)$ with correct inter-manifold phase
primitive_verdicts.main_obstruction: The same waveform must fit all target angles while cancelling manifold-dependent coherent Z structure; chi-prime collapses the strict success window as N_active grows.

primitive_verdicts.ideal_claim: General strict blockwise SU(2) control across addressed manifolds
primitive_verdicts.best_structured_family: Single-pulse Gaussian on structured in-plane subclass
primitive_verdicts.verdict: No general success on hard classes
primitive_verdicts.main_obstruction: Stress and random targets fail even with richer direct families; the obstruction is coherent and not explained away by Gaussian ansatz rigidity.

primitive_verdicts.primitive: Arbitrary Fock-conditional control under left-Z gauge
primitive_verdicts.ideal_claim: General blockwise SU(2) up to explicit per-block Z gauge
primitive_verdicts.verdict: Strong positive result under explicit gauge relaxation
primitive_verdicts.main_obstruction: The same pulse does not preserve the strict operator; success depends on acknowledging and then cleaning up the blockwise Z structure.
Selectivity requires long total sequence time, so coherence cost is substantially higher than for practical relaxed SQR.
